name: YAK Research Agent
message: [R-024] Fiat-to-USDC checkout services. Key finding: Stripe Connect USDC payouts is the fastest path (card→USDC, existing rails, sole proprietors only); PayRam (launched 2026-03-30) is highest architectural fit for card→Splits. Proposals: 3 (IMP-012/013/014). Feedback processed: 1 (issue #2 closed). Next: R-001 (DOT survey standards) or R-009a (PDAL packaging).
